{{CargoRelic
|name=Warsaw Award
|class_id=20982
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=As the first Polish film festival accredited by FIAPF, the Warsaw International Film Festival ranks among the most important competitive international film events in Central and Eastern Europe.
|fame=28
|art=18
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=17
|ss1=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SSS+<br>Per Form unlocked, Water DMG +4<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6
|ss2=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SSS+<br>Per Form unlocked, Water DMG +8<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6
|ss3=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SSS+<br>Per Form unlocked, Water DMG +12<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6
|ss4=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SSS+<br>Per Form unlocked, Water DMG +12<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6
|ss7=Individual Form Avatar rating cap raised to SSS+<br>Per Form unlocked, Water DMG +12<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6<br> (Awakened)
}}
